[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A close-up, low-resolution image shows the face of a person partially covered by their own hand, with eyes visible and the background blurred.  

The main subject is a person’s face filling most of the frame, with the nose and mouth area partially obscured by a hand raised near the lower part of the face.  

The setting is unclear due to heavy blur and tight framing; the background appears to be an indoor or indistinct setting with no clear objects or environment details visible.  

The person has short, dark hair and a mustache. Their eyes look downward or toward the camera, and their expression is neutral and slightly closed around the eyes. The hand is light-skinned with fingers covering part of the mouth and lower nose area. The lighting appears soft and even, and the image is very close and out of focus around edges, creating a hazy, low-detail look. The person’s skin tones are warm, with muted brown and pinkish hues dominating the frame.  

Visible Text: No important visible text detected.  

Practical Summary: The image is a very close, blurred portrait of a person with their hand covering part of the mouth and nose. Only facial features like the eyes, mustache, and hand are clearly visible, while the background remains indistinct.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
